understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to win each level by arranging the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' in the semantic grid was occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, within the available step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was turn-based with a limited number of steps; MOVE_* actions attempted to shift the currently selected piece in that direction but were blocked by walls/obstacles or other blocking tiles, resulting in no movement. CLICK actions targeted a specific coordinate to either select another controllable piece or command the selected piece to move/teleport to that coordinate when a valid path/interaction existed; invalid/blocked clicks produced no movement. Pushing, when possible, would require moving into an adjacent movable object to displace it, but attempts that were obstructed by walls or immovable objects did not change positions.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to win each level by arranging the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' in the semantic grid was occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, within the available step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was turn-based with a limited number of steps; MOVE_* actions attempted to shift the currently selected piece in that direction but were blocked by walls/obstacles or other blocking tiles, resulting in no movement. CLICK actions targeted a specific coordinate to either select another controllable piece or command the selected piece to move/teleport to that coordinate when a valid path/interaction existed; invalid/blocked clicks produced no movement. Pushing, when possible, would require moving into an adjacent movable object to displace it, but attempts that were obstructed by walls or immovable objects did not change positions.
